# Version 4.150.2 (Unreleased)
> **Upstream engine bug fixes**

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.2 merges upstream Skia m150 bug fixes from the Chrome stable channel.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia m150 upstream bug fixes merged** — Incorporates bug fixes from the Chrome m150 branch of the Skia renderer, keeping the bundled engine aligned with the latest stable upstream patches. ([#4517](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4517))
